ideation: This animation sequence will portray a robot reacting to an exclamation, conveying surprise or urgency. The animation will emphasize a quick, upward movement of both arms, followed by a slight pause and return to a neutral position.  The movement should feel light and quick, not forceful or heavy. The use of the wrists will enhance the expressiveness of the gesture. In the first frame, both arms are in a relaxed, neutral position at the sides. In the second frame, both arms rapidly raise upward to approximately shoulder height, with the wrists slightly tilted upward.  This mimics a surprised reaction to a sudden exclamation. In the third frame, the arms pause briefly at this raised position. This pause adds emphasis to the exclamation. Finally, in the fourth frame, the arms return to their neutral position. The speed of the animation will be crucial to convey the feeling of surprise or urgency.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed, a moment of calm
both arms shoot up in sudden surprise
a quick, sharp pause at the peak of surprise
arms drop back down, the exclamation fades
